# Dialog

Displays modal content in a focus-trapped overlay.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/dialog
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="dialog"
  example={0}
  code={`<Dialog.Root><Dialog.Trigger>Open</Dialog.Trigger><Dialog.Content><Dialog.Title>Title</Dialog.Title></Dialog.Content></Dialog.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Dialog.Root>
  <Dialog.Trigger>Open</Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Content>
    <Dialog.Title>Title</Dialog.Title>
  </Dialog.Content>
</Dialog.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="dialog"
  example={1}
  code={`<Dialog.Content><Dialog.Header><Dialog.Title>Settings</Dialog.Title><Dialog.Description>Manage preferences.</Dialog.Description></Dialog.Header></Dialog.Content>`}
/>

```tsx
<Dialog.Content>
  <Dialog.Header>
    <Dialog.Title>Settings</Dialog.Title>
    <Dialog.Description>Manage preferences.</Dialog.Description>
  </Dialog.Header>
</Dialog.Content>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="dialog"
  example={2}
  code={`<Dialog.Footer><Dialog.Close>Cancel</Dialog.Close></Dialog.Footer>`}
/>

```tsx
<Dialog.Footer>
  <Dialog.Close>Cancel</Dialog.Close>
</Dialog.Footer>
```
